topics.title: Primitive Types
topics.description: Learn about Java's primitive data types: int, double, and boolean. Understand how data is stored and used in programs.

topics.title: Variables, Operators, and Expressions
topics.description: Declare and initialize variables, use arithmetic and assignment operators, and evaluate expressions.

topics.title: Type Casting and Ranges
topics.description: Understand implicit and explicit type casting between int and double, and the range limits of primitive types.

topics.title: String Class Basics
topics.description: Create String objects, understand immutability, and use concatenation. Strings are reference types, not primitives.

topics.title: String Methods
topics.description: Use essential String methods: length(), substring(), indexOf(), equals(), compareTo(), and charAt().

topics.title: Wrapper Classes (Integer, Double)
topics.description: Understand autoboxing and unboxing between primitives and their wrapper classes Integer and Double.

topics.title: Math Class Methods
topics.description: Use static methods from the Math class: abs(), pow(), sqrt(), random(), and more.

topics.title: Object Construction and Method Calls
topics.description: Instantiate objects using constructors and call methods on objects. Understand the difference between static and instance methods.

topics.title: Boolean Expressions and Comparisons
topics.description: Write boolean expressions using relational operators (==, !=, <, >, <=, >=) and compare values.

topics.title: if/else if/else Statements
topics.description: Use conditional statements to control program flow based on boolean conditions.

topics.title: Compound Boolean Expressions
topics.description: Combine boolean expressions using logical operators AND (&&), OR (||), and NOT (!). Apply De Morgan's Laws.

topics.title: Complex Conditional Logic
topics.description: Write nested conditionals, multi-branch logic, and understand short-circuit evaluation.

topics.title: while Loops
topics.description: Use while loops for indefinite iteration. Understand loop conditions, infinite loops, and sentinel values.

topics.title: for Loops
topics.description: Use for loops for definite iteration. Understand initialization, condition, and update expressions.

topics.title: Loop Algorithms
topics.description: Implement common loop patterns: counting, summing, finding minimum/maximum, and computing averages.

topics.title: String Traversal with Loops
topics.description: Traverse strings character by character using loops and charAt(). Build new strings from existing ones.

topics.title: Nested Loops
topics.description: Use loops inside loops for pattern generation, grid traversal, and complex iterations.

topics.title: Informal Code Tracing
topics.description: Trace through code by hand to predict output. Follow variable values through loops and conditionals.

topics.title: Anatomy of a Class
topics.description: Understand the structure of a Java class: class header, instance variables, constructors, and methods.

topics.title: Writing Constructors
topics.description: Write constructors to initialize objects. Understand default constructors and overloading.

topics.title: Instance Variables and Encapsulation
topics.description: Declare private instance variables and understand encapsulation as a core OOP principle.

topics.title: Accessor (Getter) Methods
topics.description: Write public getter methods that return values of private instance variables.

topics.title: Mutator (Setter) Methods
topics.description: Write public setter methods that modify private instance variables with validation.

topics.title: Method Decomposition
topics.description: Break complex problems into smaller methods. Understand parameters, return types, and method calls within a class.

topics.title: Static Variables and Methods
topics.description: Understand the difference between static and instance members. Use static methods and variables appropriately.

topics.title: Scope and Access Modifiers
topics.description: Understand variable scope (local vs instance) and access modifiers (public vs private).

topics.title: The this Keyword
topics.description: Use the this keyword to refer to the current object, distinguish instance variables from parameters, and call other constructors.

topics.title: Reading Files with File and Scanner
topics.description: Read data from text files using java.io.File and java.util.Scanner. Process file contents line by line.

topics.title: 1D Array Creation and Access
topics.description: Create arrays, access elements by index, understand array length, and handle ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.

topics.title: Array Traversal Patterns
topics.description: Traverse arrays using standard for loops and enhanced for-each loops. Understand when to use each pattern.

topics.title: Array Algorithms
topics.description: Implement standard array algorithms: sum, average, find min/max, count matches, and shift elements.

topics.title: ArrayList Creation and Methods
topics.description: Create ArrayLists, use add(), get(), set(), remove(), and size() methods. Understand generics syntax.

topics.title: ArrayList Traversal and Modification
topics.description: Traverse ArrayLists safely while adding or removing elements. Avoid ConcurrentModificationException pitfalls.

topics.title: ArrayList Algorithms
topics.description: Apply standard algorithms to ArrayLists: filtering, searching, accumulating, and transforming collections.

topics.title: 2D Array Creation and Access
topics.description: Create 2D arrays (arrays of arrays), access elements with row and column indices, understand dimensions.

topics.title: 2D Array Traversal
topics.description: Traverse 2D arrays using nested loops in row-major and column-major order. Process grids and matrices.

topics.title: Linear Search
topics.description: Implement sequential search through arrays and ArrayLists. Understand O(n) time complexity.

topics.title: Binary Search
topics.description: Implement binary search on sorted arrays. Understand O(log n) time complexity and the requirement for sorted data.

topics.title: Selection Sort
topics.description: Implement selection sort by repeatedly finding the minimum element. Understand O(n²) time complexity.

topics.title: Insertion Sort
topics.description: Implement insertion sort by building a sorted portion one element at a time. Compare with selection sort.
